news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked increased 12% this week, driven by growing trading volume on new DEXes, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_zh: Cardano 公布Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG team released Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, enabling stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展跨链生态。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain capabilities.

news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing transaction fees for micro-payments.
